compiled_state.description:
# S2 — Broaden Gerrit replication to change refs (ADR-0010 reversal)

Part of epic 1fa8 (CI as a second Gerrit gate vote via gerrit-to-platform → GitHub Actions).

## Why
The GitHub Actions runner must fetch the exact patchset under test. The g2p production pattern
(ONAP/O-RAN-SC) relies on Gerrit replicating change refs to the GitHub mirror; today
`infra/gerrit/replication.config` mirrors only `refs/heads/main` + `refs/tags/*` (ADR-0010).

## What
Broaden replication with a **scoped** change-ref refspec — deliberately NOT a wildcard `refs/*`,
which would replicate `refs/meta/config` (it embeds the webhook token; ADR-0010/0014 keep it off
GitHub). Record the reversal as an ADR superseding/amending ADR-0010.

## Scope
- `infra/gerrit/replication.config` (add one scoped refspec line).
- New ADR superseding/amending ADR-0010; update the refspec table in `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md`.
- Out of scope: g2p install, credentials, the workflow, the gate.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Add a scoped `refs/changes/*:refs/changes/*` refspec to `infra/gerrit/replication.config`
      alongside the existing `refs/heads/main` + `refs/tags/*` lines (NOT wildcard `refs/*`).
- [ ] Retain `replicatePermissions = false` and ensure `refs/meta/*` is NOT replicated (protects the
      webhook token per ADR-0014); `checkout-gerrit-change-action`'s `gerrit-url` fallback covers
      replication lag.
- [ ] Confirm the GitHub mirror-lock ruleset still bars all non-replication writes to `main`.
- [ ] Write an ADR superseding/amending **ADR-0010** (replication now includes change refs).
- [ ] Update the refspec table in `docs/gerrit-aws-setup.md`.
compiled_state.title: S2 — Broaden Gerrit replication to change refs (ADR-0010 reversal)
